title: Vanilla Blooming Blocks
description: This Texture Pack adds a subtle glowing/bloom effect to most light sources requiring NO MODS! Works with sodium/iris/optifine/vanilla
body:
Adds a subtle glowing bloom effect to most light blocks. 
**This requires NO MODS! Just vanilla Minecraft.** Works with sodium/iris/optifine/vanilla
![Example of torches glowing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30ca461938afc2c1b04ebd33b6adbc5470630170.png)
Most of the light emitted has a subtle animation to add emersion!
![Glowing End Portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/761a57b8e3a52e8c85edf489cdfba37624789a25.png)

Included blocks are:
![All Included blocks so far](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/920efab96b7d578b376248ebede3be9ca1891f3c.png)
All lanterns, all candles, all torches, glow lichen, end rod, respawn anchor, end portal and blast furnace. More to come soon...
